scripts.dev:worker: cd services/worker-service && uv run fastapi dev src/main.py
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=services/api-gateway && cd services/worker-service && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=services/api-gateway && cd services/worker-service && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=services/api-gateway && cd services/worker-service && uv run mypy src/
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=services/api-gateway && cd services/worker-service && uv run pytest
scripts.spec:validate: npx @redocly/cli lint specs/openapi/*.yaml && npx @asyncapi/cli validate specs/asyncapi/*.yaml
